audit_items.proof_trace: Lines 170-171 perform the division `usdPrice / 10^(feedDecimals-18)` when feedDecimals > PRICE_DECIMALS (18). The unconditional zero-check at L174-176 (`if (usdPrice == 0) revert ZeroFeedData()`) is placed after all scaling branches and before the storage write at L178, ensuring any truncation-to-zero is caught on every execution path.
